title: Poaephyllum parviflorum
taxonomy: Poaephyllum parviflorum belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified within the genus Poaephyllum. It is a species of orchid native to New Guinea. Poaephyllum parviflorum is a small, delicate orchid with tiny flowers. The species is relatively rare and has limited geographical distribution. Further classification of Poaephyllum parviflorum may involve its position within the subtribe and tribe of the Orchidaceae family.
